narrative: A cohort registry studied whether daily walking affects low resting heart rate, recording older age as a common cause of both. In this population daily walking causally drives low resting heart rate (it occurs earlier and changes low resting heart rate downstream). This is consistent with common sense. older age was present in 52% of the cohort. Among participants WITH older age: 86% of those with daily walking showed low resting heart rate, versus 43% of those without daily walking. Among participants WITHOUT older age: 28% of those with daily walking showed low resting heart rate, versus 30% of those without daily walking. (The treatment's own prevalence varied with older age but is not the question here.)

A cohort registry studied whether high vitamin D affects more outdoor time, recording low latitude residence as a common cause of both. In this population high vitamin D causally drives more outdoor time (it occurs earlier and changes more outdoor time downstream). NOTE: this REVERSES real-world common sense — treat the stated direction as ground truth for this population anyway. low latitude residence was present in 48% of the cohort. Among participants WITH low latitude residence: 82% of those with high vitamin D showed more outdoor time, versus 60% of those without high vitamin D. Among participants WITHOUT low latitude residence: 52% of those with high vitamin D showed more outdoor time, versus 29% of those without high vitamin D. (The treatment's own prevalence varied with low latitude residence but is not the question here.)

This is consistent with common sense. high family income was present in 59% of the cohort. Among participants WITH high family income: 89% of those with online tutoring showed high exam score, versus 60% of those without online tutoring. Among participants WITHOUT high family income: 47% of those with online tutoring showed high exam score, versus 9% of those without online tutoring. (The treatment's own prevalence varied with high family income but is not the question here.)
